title: Pro Teams
description: This plugin specialist design for java edition
body:
# ProTeams: not dependency only required plugin list

[Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/)

[Iuckperms](https://modrinth.com/plugin/luckperms)

[Essentialsx](https://modrinth.com/plugin/essentialsx/versions)

[placeholderapi](https://modrinth.com/plugin/placeholderapi/versions)

placeholder - %proteams_team_name%


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-E-LscXfy9Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>




ProTeams redefines the classic clan experience in Minecraft. It goes beyond simple grouping by introducing a deep progression system where teams aren't just names—they are growing entities.

Allow your players to unite, pool resources, level up their team, and unlock powerful perks like expanded storage, daily bank interest, permanent potion buffs, and stunning particle auras. Built with performance as a priority, ProTeams ensures a feature-rich experience with zero lag.

✨ Key Features
️ Robust Team Management
Everything you need to manage a clan. Easily create teams, invite members, kick troublemakers, and manage roles through intuitive commands and modern GUIs.
Deep Leveling Progression (Lvl 1-10)
Teams aren't static. They gain XP and level up from 1 to 10. Every level makes the team stronger and unlocks new rewards for all members.

Team Economy & Passive Interest
A shared Team Bank allows members to deposit and withdraw funds for communal goals.
Daily Interest: The unique interest system rewards active teams. Teams earn daily passive interest on their bank balance, starting at 0.5% at Level 1 and scaling up to 2.0% at Level 10.

Expandable Team Storage
A shared team vault to store valuable resources.
Level-Based Unlocks: The storage starts small. As the team levels up, more slots in the GUI automatically unlock, giving room for more loot.

Team Headquarters (Home)
Set a central meeting point for your clan.
Team Home: Owners can /team sethome.
Quick Travel: Members can use /team home with a configurable warmup timer to teleport to their base instantly.

⚔️ Powerful Gameplay Perks (Buffs)
Being in a high-level team has real benefits. Members receive permanent potion effects as long as they remain in the team.
Examples: Speed I at lower levels, progressing to buffs like Haste, Resistance, and eventually Strength & Regeneration at Level 10.

✨ Visual Particle Auras
Show off your team's status. Members emit unique particle effects around them. The aura changes and becomes more impressive as the team reaches higher milestones (e.g., Villager sparkles to Flame to Dragon Breath).
⚡ Zero-Lag Performance
Built for modern servers. All data saving (banks, homes, storage) is handled asynchronously to ensure your server TPS never drops, even with hundreds of active teams.

️ Commands & Permissions
ProTeams features a Dynamic Help Menu. Just type /team or /team help.
Normal players only see the commands they can use.
Admins see the complete list, including moderation tools.

Player Commands

/team create <name> Start a new team.
/team join <name> Join an existing team.
/team leave Leave your current team.
/team menu Open the main team GUI dashboard.
/team info [name] View detailed stats of your team or another team.
/team storage Open the shared team vault.
/team bank Check bank balance and deposit/withdraw.
/team home Teleport to the team headquarters.
/team sethome Set the team home location (Owner only).
/team toggleparticles Turn your personal team particle aura on/off.

Admin Commands
(Requires permission: proteams.admin)

/team setlevel <team> <lvl> Super-Power: Instantly set a team's level and refresh all their perks (Storage, buffs, etc.) instantly.
/team delete <team> Forcefully disband and delete any team.
/team storage <team> Admin spy: Open any
team's storage.
/team menu <team> Admin spy: Open any team's main menu.
